name: eggd_cgp-qc-flags
title: eggd_cgp-qc-flags
summary: Post-process PURPLE output to emit structured QC flags and best-fit purity for NO_TUMOR samples

inputSpec.name: sample_id
inputSpec.label: Sample ID
inputSpec.help: Sample identifier string. Must contain only A-Za-z0-9._- and must not begin with a dot or hyphen.

inputSpec.name: purity_tsv
inputSpec.label: *.purple.purity.tsv from eggd_cgp-purple
inputSpec.help: PURPLE purity summary (*.purple.purity.tsv) produced by eggd_cgp-purple. Contains one data row with purity, ploidy, status, WGD, and confidence-interval fields.

inputSpec.name: purity_range_tsv
inputSpec.label: *.purple.purity.range.tsv from eggd_cgp-purple
inputSpec.help: PURPLE purity range grid (*.purple.purity.range.tsv) produced by eggd_cgp-purple. Used only when status=NO_TUMOR to recover the best-fit purity and ploidy from the scored grid.

inputSpec.name: sigs_allocation
inputSpec.label: *.sig.allocation.tsv from cgp-sigs
inputSpec.help: Mutational-signature SNV allocation table (*.sig.allocation.tsv) from cgp-sigs. Optional; drives the LOW_SNV_COUNT flag when total allocated SNVs < 50. Unlinked in eggd_atlas_cnv v0.1.

inputSpec.name: cup_summary
inputSpec.label: *.cuppa.pred_summ.tsv from cgp-cuppa
inputSpec.help: CUPpa tumour-of-origin prediction summary (*.cuppa.pred_summ.tsv) from cgp-cuppa. Optional; top-1 and top-2 predictions are carried through to the QC report. Unlinked in eggd_atlas_cnv v0.1.
